title: astragalus palaestinus
intro: Astragalus palaestinus, also known as the biblical lotus, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to the Middle East. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus palaestinus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or supplements, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
